description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a modern, fitted long coat with a high collar and angular lapels, accented by metallic buttons and trim. The coat is worn over a matching set of pants and a shirt, with visible gloves on both hands and a belt with a prominent buckle at the waist. The figure's boots are sturdy and lace-up, suitable for urban environments, and the overall attire suggests a blend of style and utility. The individual has a short, neatly styled haircut and a clean-shaven face, giving a contemporary and alert appearance. The clothing features subtle geometric patterns and reinforced sections, especially at the elbows and shoulders, hinting at a functional or possibly protective purpose. No visible accessories or carried objects are present, and the figure stands upright with a confident, ready posture.
description: A modern adult male in a fitted long coat with gloves, boots, and a short haircut, standing upright and alert. The attire is stylish yet functional, with metallic accents and reinforced details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared coat, metallic buttons, gloves, and facial features with a confident stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coat's length, arm reinforcement, glove, and boot details, with the profile of the face and hairstyle visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the high-collared coat with geometric trim, the belt, and the back of the boots and gloves.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coat's structure, arm and leg details, and the side profile of the head and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: long modern coat with high collar, fitted pants, gloves, and utility boots
